proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).first = x0 }[X, Y](a.act(g, p.first), b.act(g, p.second))

function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: T2, x2: Pair[T0, T1], x3: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.act(x1, x2.first), x3.act(x1, x2.second)) = product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[X, Y, G](a, g, p, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).second = x1 }[X, Y](a.act(g, p.first), b.act(g, p.second))

function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: T2, x2: Pair[T0, T1], x3: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.act(x1, x2.first), x3.act(x1, x2.second)) = product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[X, Y, G](a, g, p, b)
function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3).first = x0.act(x2, x3.first) }[X, Y, G](a, b, G.1, p)
product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, G.1, p).first != a.act(G.1, p.first)
a.act(G.1, p.first) != lhs.first
function[T0, T1](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x0.second) = x0 }[X, Y](p)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Pair[X, Y], Y](Pair.second[X, Y], lhs)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Pair[X, Y], Y](Pair.second[X, Y], p)

function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: T2, x2: Pair[T0, T1], x3: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.act(x1, x2.first), x3.act(x1, x2.second)) = product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[X, Y, G](a, G.1, p, b)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1) { x0.act(T0.1, x1) = x1 }[G, Y](b, p.second)
b.act(G.1, p.second) != lhs.second
p = lhs
product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, G.1, p) != lhs

goal: action_identity_constraint[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b)) = forall(x0: Pair[X, Y]) { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, G.1, x0) = x0 }
proof: function[T0, T1: Group](x0: (T1, T0) -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(T1.1, x1) = x1 } = action_identity_constraint[T1, T0](x0) }[Pair[X, Y], G](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))
let w0: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, G.1, w0) != w0 }
function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: MulAction[T0, T2], x2: Pair[T1, T2]) { product_act[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, T0.1, x2) = x2 }[G, X, Y](a, b, w0)
function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3).first = x0.act(x2, x3.first) }[X, Y, G](a, b, g * h, p)
product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, g * h, p).first != a.act(g * h, p.first)
a.act(g, a.act(h, p.first)) != a.act(g * h, p.first)

goal: product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p).first = a.act(h, p.first)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3).first = x0.act(x2, x3.first) }[X, Y, G](a, b, h, p)

goal: rhs.first = a.act(g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p).first)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3).first = x0.act(x2, x3.first) }[X, Y, G](a, b, g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p))
product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p)).first != a.act(g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p).first)
a.act(g, a.act(h, p.first)) != lhs.first
function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3).second = x1.act(x2, x3.second) }[X, Y, G](a, b, g * h, p)
product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, g * h, p).second != b.act(g * h, p.second)
b.act(g, b.act(h, p.second)) != b.act(g * h, p.second)

goal: product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p).second = b.act(h, p.second)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3).second = x1.act(x2, x3.second) }[X, Y, G](a, b, h, p)

goal: rhs.second = b.act(g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p).second)
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x0.second) = x0 }[X, Y](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, g * h, p))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Pair[X, Y], Y](Pair.second[X, Y], rhs)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Pair[X, Y], Y](Pair.second[X, Y], lhs)

function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: T2, x2: Pair[T0, T1], x3: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.act(x1, x2.first), x3.act(x1, x2.second)) = product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[X, Y, G](a, g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p), b)
b.act(g, b.act(h, p.second)) != lhs.second
rhs = lhs
product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p)) != lhs
product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, g, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, h, p)) = lhs

goal: action_mul_constraint[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b)) = forall(x0: G, x1: G, x2: Pair[X, Y]) { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, x0 * x1, x2) = product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, x0, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, x1, x2)) }
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) = x0(x1 * x2, x3) } = action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G, k1: Pair[X, Y]) { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, k0, k1)) != product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0 * k0, k1) } }
let w1: G satisfy { exists(k2: Pair[X, Y]) { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w1, k2)) != product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0 * w1, k2) } }
let w2: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w1, w2)) != product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0 * w1, w2) }
let w3: G satisfy { exists(k3: Pair[X, Y]) { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w3, k3)) != product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0 * w3, k3) } }
let w4: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w3, w4)) != product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0 * w3, w4) }
let w5: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0, product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w3, w5)) != product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, w0 * w3, w5) }

function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: MulAction[T0, T2], x2: T0, x3: T0, x4: Pair[T1, T2]) { product_act[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, product_act[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x3, x4)) = product_act[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2 * x3, x4) }[G, X, Y](a, b, w0, w3, w5)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { (action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) and action_identity_constraint[T0, T1](x0)) = is_mul_action[T0, T1](x0) }[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))
function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: MulAction[T0, T2]) { action_mul_constraint[T0, Pair[T1, T2]](product_act[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1)) }[G, X, Y](a, b)
function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: MulAction[T0, T2]) { action_identity_constraint[T0, Pair[T1, T2]](product_act[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1)) }[G, X, Y](a, b)
not (action_mul_constraint[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b)) and action_identity_constraint[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b)))

goal: exists(k0: MulAction[G, Pair[X, Y]]) { MulAction.new[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { not MulAction.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: MulAction[T0, T1]) { MulAction.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](k0) } }[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { MulAction.constraint[T0, T1](x0) = is_mul_action[T0, T1](x0) }[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))
not MulAction.constraint[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))
MulAction.constraint[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))

goal: product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p) = product_act[G, X, Y](a, b, g, p)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: (T0, T1) -> T1, x2: T0, x3: T1) { Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](x0) != MulAction.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.act(x2, x3) = x1(x2, x3) }[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), product_act[G, X, Y](a, b), g, p)

function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: MulAction[T0, T2]) { Option.some[MulAction[T0, Pair[T1, T2]]](product_action[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1)) = MulAction.new[T0, Pair[T1, T2]](product_act[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1)) }[G, X, Y](a, b)
Option.some(product_action[G, X, Y](a, b)) != MulAction.new[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_act[G, X, Y](a, b))

function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: T2, x2: Pair[T0, T1], x3: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.act(x1, x2.first), x3.act(x1, x2.second)) = product_act[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[X, Y, G](a, g, p, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).first = x0 }[X, Y](a.act(g, p.first), b.act(g, p.second))

function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: T2, x2: Pair[T0, T1], x3: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.act(x1, x2.first), x3.act(x1, x2.second)) = product_action[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3).act(x1, x2) }[X, Y, G](a, g, p, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).second = x1 }[X, Y](a.act(g, p.first), b.act(g, p.second))

function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: T2, x2: Pair[T0, T1], x3: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.act(x1, x2.first), x3.act(x1, x2.second)) = product_action[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3).act(x1, x2) }[X, Y, G](a, g, p, b)

goal: product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).first = product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).first
product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).first = a.act(g, p.first)

proof: function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: MulAction[T0, T1], x2: MulAction[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.act(x3, x4)) = x2.act(x3, x0(x4)) } = is_equivariant_map[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[G, Pair[X, Y], X](Pair.first[X, Y], product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), a)
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: Pair[X, Y]) { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(w0, k0).first != a.act(w0, k0.first) } }
let w1: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(w0, w1).first != a.act(w0, w1.first) }
let w2: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(w0, w2).first != a.act(w0, w2.first) }
function(x0: G, x1: Pair[X, Y]) { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(x0, x1).first = a.act(x0, x1.first) }(w0, w2)

goal: product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).second = product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).second
product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).second = b.act(g, p.second)

proof: function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: MulAction[T0, T1], x2: MulAction[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.act(x3, x4)) = x2.act(x3, x0(x4)) } = is_equivariant_map[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[G, Pair[X, Y], Y](Pair.second[X, Y], product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), b)
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: Pair[X, Y]) { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(w0, k0).second != b.act(w0, k0.second) } }
let w1: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(w0, w1).second != b.act(w0, w1.second) }
let w2: Pair[X, Y] satisfy { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(w0, w2).second != b.act(w0, w2.second) }
function(x0: G, x1: Pair[X, Y]) { product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(x0, x1).second = b.act(x0, x1.second) }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: G) { q = product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(k0, p) }
proof: not q ∈ orbit[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), p)
product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).first != a.act(g, p.first)
product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).second != b.act(g, p.second)
not a.act(g, p.first) ∈ orbit[G, X](a, p.first)
not b.act(g, p.second) ∈ orbit[G, Y](b, p.second)
function[T0: Group, T1, T2](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: MulAction[T0, T2]) { is_equivariant_map[T0, Pair[T1, T2], T1](product_action[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1), x0, Pair.first[T1, T2]) }[G, X, Y](a, b)

function[T0, T1: Group, T5](x0: MulAction[T1, T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: MulAction[T1, T5], x4: T0 -> T5) { not x2 ∈ orbit[T1, T0](x0, x1) or not is_equivariant_map[T1, T0, T5](x0, x3, x4) or x4(x2) ∈ orbit[T1, T5](x3, x4(x1)) }[Pair[X, Y], G, X](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), p, q, a, Pair.first[X, Y])
q.second ∈ orbit[G, Y](b, p.second)
not q.first ∈ orbit[G, X](a, p.first)
function(x0: MulAction[G, Pair[X, Y]]) { not q ∈ orbit[G, Pair[X, Y]](x0, p) or not is_equivariant_map[G, Pair[X, Y], X](x0, a, Pair.first[X, Y]) }(product_action[G, X, Y](a, b))

goal: product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).first = q.first
proof: function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_action[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1).act(x2, x3).first = x0.act(x2, x3.first) }[X, Y, G](a, b, g, p)
a.act(g, p.first) = q.first
a.act(g, p.first) != q.first

goal: product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).second = q.second
proof: function[T0, T1, T2: Group](x0: MulAction[T2, T0], x1: MulAction[T2, T1], x2: T2, x3: Pair[T0, T1]) { product_action[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1).act(x2, x3).second = x1.act(x2, x3.second) }[X, Y, G](a, b, g, p)
b.act(g, p.second) = q.second
b.act(g, p.second) != q.second

goal: q = product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p)
proof: product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).second != q.second or product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).first != q.first
product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p).first != q.first

goal: orbit[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), p).contains(q)
proof: not product_action[G, X, Y](a, b).act(g, p) ∈ orbit[G, Pair[X, Y]](product_action[G, X, Y](a, b), p)
b.act(g, p.second) != q.second or a.act(g, p.first) != q.first
b.act(g, p.second) = q.second
a.act(g, p.first) = q.first
a.act(g, p.first) != q.first
